name: Scallop Salad
recipeInstructions:
Dressing:
Juice of 1 lemon
1/2 cup oil
1 crushed garlic clove
1 tsp grated fresh ginger
1 tbsp sesame oil
Salad:
Red and yellow bell peppers, julienned
Mushrooms with long stems and tiny heads
Fresh cilantro
1. Combine dressing ingredients in a bowl.
2. Arrange lettuce leaves on each plate.
3. Place mushrooms on either end of the plate, with the heads pointing outward.
4. Sprinkle red and yellow bell peppers from the center outwards (like spokes on a wheel).
5. Scatter whole cilantro among the peppers.
6. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add scallops and garlic; cook until just done.
7. Drain excess oil from scallops, then pile in the middle of each plate.
8. Drizzle dressing over the salad and serve immediately.
